roa.docketEntryComment: /TO SET RESTITUTION DETERMINATION & POSSIBLE DISMISSAL/X:DEFENDANT HAS SATISFIED ALL THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF HIS INFORMAL DIVERSION/MO PC 1385:INFORMAL DIVERSION COMPLETED/

/CAL:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT;POSS DISMISSAL/X:PD IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN PROOF OF 40 HOURS AA CLASSES TO THE D,A,'S OFFICE/X:PER D,A,, DEFENDANT HAS NO NEW ARREST/CONTD: TO SET REST DETERM &POSS DISMISSAL/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/X: THE  MATTER ENTERS INTO INFORMAL DIVERSION/CTORD: AS CONDITIONS OF THE INFORMAL DIVERSION, THE DEFENDANT MUST ATTEND AA MEETING 2 TIMES PER WEEK, NO NEW ARREST OR CHARGES AND ABIDE BY THECRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER, THIS IS FOR A 5 MONTH PERIOD/EMTERM/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING AND STATUS OF ENROUTE/SATERM: 02-17-21/SA5: TERANCE BAGBY/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORTTO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/WEAP/WS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:04-01-21/X:30TH DAY/CAUSE1/X:60TH DAY IS 04-19-21/987,2/OR/SA1:TERANCE BAGBY/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: STATUS OF EN ROUTE & TO SET 02-25-21/DOP/
